allow: Bash(node -e "const tsl = require\(''three/tsl''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(tsl\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''bloom''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''glow''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''unrealbloom''\)\).join\(''\\n''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const tsl = require\(''three/tsl''\); const keys = Object.keys\(tsl\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.includes\(''ao''\) || k.includes\(''Ao''\) || k.includes\(''AO''\) || k.includes\(''fxaa''\) || k.includes\(''Fxaa''\) || k.includes\(''dof''\) || k.includes\(''Dof''\) || k.includes\(''DOF''\) || k.includes\(''ssr''\) || k.includes\(''denoise''\) || k.includes\(''motion''\) || k.includes\(''outline''\)\).join\(''\\n''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const tsl = require\(''three/tsl''\); const keys = Object.keys\(tsl\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => /color|Color|gauss|Gauss|blur|Blur|vignette|Vignette|sepia|invert|tone|Tone|gamma|exposure|luminance|threshold/.test\(k\)\).join\(''\\n''\)\)")
